evals.prompt: what have i been working on lately
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive breakdown of recent git activity and Claude usage with insights about focus areas, patterns, and trends

evals.prompt: show me my commit stats for the last 3 months as a csv
evals.expected_output: A CSV table with repos as columns, weeks as rows, and commit counts as values

evals.prompt: am I more productive on weekdays or weekends? what time do I usually code?
evals.expected_output: Analysis of weekday vs weekend patterns, time-of-day distribution, and identification of peak coding hours from both git and Claude session data

evals.prompt: how much am I using Claude? which tools and models do I use most?
evals.expected_output: Claude session summary with cost, model breakdown, tool usage ranking, skills used, and per-project AI assistance patterns
Full developer profile combining git activity and Claude usage with cross-referenced insights about coding patterns, AI assistance, and workflow habits
